zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Tysen Swaim於1680年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼里士滿時，她的父親Anthony Tysen Swaim21歲，母親Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene19歲。她於1700年與Nicholas John Wilmouth在美國加州溫圖拉波普阿可弗吉尼亞 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1717年6月16日在美國維吉尼亞州謝佛遜加斯托享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Tysen Swaim于1680年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼里士滿时，她的父亲Anthony Tysen Swaim21岁，母亲Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene19岁。她于1700年与Nicholas John Wilmouth在美国加州溫圖拉波普阿可弗吉尼亞 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1717年6月16日在美国弗吉尼亚州謝佛遜加斯托享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swaim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch   Sweem  . Compare   Swim   and   Swims  .

History: The surname Swaim was adopted in the late 17th century by the Dutch Barentse (or, according to other sources, Van Pelt) family in Staten Island, NY. The family legend says that it is an acronym for Sworn to Withhold Allegiance from Invading Monarchy, the slogan of a Dutch resistance group in New Netherlands.

variants.name: Sweem
meanings: Dutch: nickname from Middle Dutch sweem, the name of a waterbird, or a topographic name from Middle Dutch sweme ‘wet land, pond’. Alternatively, perhaps Dutch form of the related German surname Schwemm (see Schwemmer ). The surname Sweem is not found in the Netherlands. Compare Swaim , Swim , and Swims .

variants.name: Swims
meanings: Altered form of Swaim or Swim , surnames of Dutch and English (ultimately perhaps German) origin, with the addition of excrescent -s.

variants.name: Swim
meanings: Altered form of   Swaim  , a surname of Dutch origin.
English: Anglicized form of an unidentified, perhaps German surname.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

nameMeanings.name: Tysen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: transferred use of the surname, which is of dual origin. In part it is a metronymic from the medieval woman's given name Dye, a pet form of Dionysia , and in part it is a nickname for a hot-tempered person, from Old French tison ‘firebrand’. As a given name it is often taken as an expanded form of or patronymic from Ty .

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries 1683: Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Richmond, New York, United States 1898: Borough of Richmond, New York, United States 1975: Borough of Staten Island, New York United States

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Tysen Swaim was born in 1680, in Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Anthony Tysen Swaim, was 21 and her mother, Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene, was 19. She married Nicholas John Wilmouth in 1700, in Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, California, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 16 June 1717, in Jamestown, Jefferson, Virginia, United States, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Tysen Swaim est née en 1680, à Richmond, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Anthony Tysen Swaim, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas John Wilmouth en 1700, à Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, Californie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 juin 1717, à Jamestown, Jefferson, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Tysen Swaim 1680 in Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anthony Tysen Swaim 21 und ihre Mutter Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene 19. Sie hat 1700 in Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, Kalifornien, Vereinigte Staaten Nicholas John Wilmouth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Juni 1717 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Jamestown, Jefferson, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Tysen Swaim è nata il nel 1680 nel Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Anthony Tysen Swaim, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas John Wilmouth nel 1700, nel Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, California, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 giugno 1717, nel Jamestown, Jefferson, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Tysen Swaimが1680年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーリチモンドで生まれた時，父Anthony Tysen Swaimは21歳，母Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuCheneは19歳であった。1700年にアメリカ合衆国カリフォルニア州ベントゥラムールパークバージニア コロニーでNicholas John Wilmouthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1717年6月16日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ジェフエルソンジャムストウンで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Tysen Swaim(이)가 1680년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 리ch몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anthony Tysen Swaim(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1700년 미국 캘리포니아 주 븐투라 무르박 버지니아 콜론이에서 Nicholas John Wilmouth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1717년 6월 16일 미국 버지니아 주 제퍼슨 자메스타운에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Tysen Swaim nasceu em 1680, em Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Anthony Tysen Swaim, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas John Wilmouth em 1700, em Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, Califórnia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de junho de 1717, em Jamestown, Jefferson, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 37 anos.

ru.Richmond, New York, British Colonial Ame: ричмонд, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Tysen Swaim родилась в 1680 г. в местности ричмонд, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Anthony Tysen Swaim было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas John Wilmouth в 1700 г. в местности виргиня колони, мурпарк, вентура, Калифорния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 16 июня 1717 г. в местности джеместоун, джеффирсон, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Tysen Swaim nació en 1680, en Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Anthony Tysen Swaim, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Nicholas John Wilmouth en 1700, en Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, California, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de junio de 1717, en Jamestown, Jefferson, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 37 años.
